title: 2 Pack Balloon Pumps, Balloon Inflator Pump Ballon Pump, Balloon Pump Hand for Weddings and Birthday Parties, Two Random Colors(with 2 Balloon Knotters and 200 Glue Dots)
features: 【Kit List】You will receive 2pcs pump for balloons, 2pcs balloon tying tool, 200pcs glue dots for decorating and sticking the balloons, we provide more complete balloon decorating kits.Macaron colors, pink, blue, purple, red, cyan, two random colors(Macaron color, two random colors)

【Non-slip Design】The hand balloon pump handle and pump nozzle are both with non-slip design, you can hold the pump without slipping, making the inflation process smoother and faster. The nozzle is designed with an angled cutout for easier insertion into the balloon, keeping the balloon stationary and firmly attached for increased efficiency.

【Time & Effort Saving】The balloon hand pump has multiple air inlet holes at the bottom to draw air in at the top and bottom, ensuring a large air inlet for more efficient inflation during the rise and fall phases. More than double the speed.
【Quality Material】Our ballon pump is made of new thickened environmentally friendly material, durable and not easy to break, can be used for a long time.

【Widely Used】This balloon air pump can be used to help decorate balloons at any party, suitable for most latex and foil balloons, also suitable for fitness balloons, bouncing balls, fitness ring swimming, etc Colourful balloons will make the party more fun. Adults and older children can use it.
description: Material: PP material Specifications: 5 cm diameter 28 cm height Usage: Can be used to inflate balloons, swimming rings and PVC inflatable products. Note: Color is sent randomly Commitment: 100% exceeding rate guaranteed for this product.
